code:
mut i = 1
mut fizz = 0
mut buzz = 0

while i <= 15
  fizz = fizz + 1
  buzz = buzz + 1

  if fizz == 3 and buzz == 5
    println("FizzBuzz")
    fizz = 0
    buzz = 0
  else if fizz == 3
    println("Fizz")
    fizz = 0
  else if buzz == 5
    println("Buzz")
    buzz = 0
  else
    println("#{i}")
  end

  i = i + 1
end
